info.name: Light Workflow Insurance Claim Demo
info.description: Phase 6 demo collection for starting REST, MCP, and headless insurance claim workflows and completing human tasks.

body.raw:
{
  "host": "{{host}}",
  "service": "workflow",
  "action": "startWorkflow",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "data": {
    "hostId": "{{hostId}}",
    "wfDefId": "{{restWfDefId}}",
    "input": {
      "customerId": "CUST-1001",
      "vehicleId": "VEH-1001",
      "incidentDate": "2026-05-30",
      "accidentDescription": "Rear-ended at an intersection. No injuries reported.",
      "location": "Ottawa, ON",
      "injuryReported": false,
      "vehicleDrivable": false,
      "policeReportFiled": true,
      "photosAvailable": true,
      "channel": "portal"
    }
  }
}

{
  "host": "{{host}}",
  "service": "workflow",
  "action": "startWorkflow",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "data": {
    "hostId": "{{hostId}}",
    "wfDefId": "{{mcpWfDefId}}",
    "input": {
      "customerId": "CUST-1001",
      "vehicleId": "VEH-1001",
      "incidentDate": "2026-05-30",
      "accidentDescription": "Rear-ended at an intersection. No injuries reported.",
      "location": "Ottawa, ON",
      "injuryReported": false,
      "vehicleDrivable": false,
      "policeReportFiled": true,
      "photosAvailable": true,
      "channel": "portal"
    }
  }
}

{
  "host": "{{host}}",
  "service": "workflow",
  "action": "startWorkflow",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "data": {
    "hostId": "{{hostId}}",
    "wfDefId": "{{headlessWfDefId}}",
    "input": {
      "customerId": "CUST-1001",
      "vehicleId": "VEH-1001",
      "incidentDate": "2026-05-30",
      "accidentDescription": "Rear-ended at an intersection. No injuries reported.",
      "location": "Ottawa, ON",
      "injuryReported": false,
      "vehicleDrivable": false,
      "policeReportFiled": true,
      "photosAvailable": true,
      "channel": "portal",
      "simulateMissingInfo": false,
      "missingFields": [],
      "approvalMode": "auto-approve",
      "siuMode": "clear",
      "customerResponseMode": "accept-repair"
    }
  }
}
